description: This script automates updating version number references across multiple project files, as well as bumping the npm package version, based on user-provided old and new versions. It reads files, replaces version strings, and executes npm commands.

methods.name: regExpQuote
methods.description: Escapes special regex characters in a string.

methods.name: regExpQuoteReplacement
methods.description: Escapes dollar signs in a string for replacement purposes.

methods.name: replaceRecursively
methods.description: Reads a file and replaces old version strings with new version strings; handles multiple replacement patterns.

methods.name: bumpNpmVersion
methods.description: Runs 'npm version' command to update the package version without creating a git tag.

methods.name: showUsage
methods.description: Displays usage instructions and exits the process.

methods.name: main
methods.description: Main entry point; processes arguments, initiates version bump and file replacements.
